title: Language Teaching Application and Research Center - Registration & Fees
content:
Language Teaching Application and Research Center - Registration & Fees

Required Documents for Registration

2 passport-sized photographs (taken within the last 6 months)

Bank receipt showing payment of the course fee

A copy of the passport page containing identity information or a copy of a national ID card

Completed registration form

The student must be present during the registration process.

Registrations or payments cannot be made on behalf of another person.

Attendance Policy

Students must attend at least 80% of the classes.

Those who exceed the absence limit will not be allowed to take the exam and will be considered unsuccessful.

Turkish Course Fees

The fee for each level (course) is $230 USD.

If the student chooses to pay for all 5 levels in advance, the discounted total fee is $1000 USD.
